jobs.title: Pizza Chef (f/m/d)
jobs.company: Grand Hotel des Bains Kempinski St. Moritz
jobs.description:
The Grand Hotel des Bains Kempinski will host the remarkable Billionaire Dinner Show. The event, which already takes place year-round in Dubai and in summer at its historic location in Porto Cervo and at the legendary Sporting in Monte Carlo, will now expand its presence to St. Moritz. Billionaire, part of the Majestas Group, is a premier destination for luxury dining, entertainment and exclusive experiences for all our guests at the world's most exclusive venues. Combining exceptional cuisine, breathtaking ambience and unparalleled service, we cater to the world's elite, offering a unique blend of sophistication and excitement every evening. To support our kitchen team, we are looking for you as a seasonal pizza chef for the summerseason 2026. In this role, you will learn the unique recipe for the famous ‘Crazy Pizza’. | Key 
• Responsibilities: Your main task is to create pizzas according to the well-known recipes of ‘Crazy Pizza’ and to ensure that every pizza meets our high quality and freshness standards. In addition to maintaining a spotless kitchen, you will work closely with the head chef, gain valuable insights from team feedback and continuously expand your culinary expertise. Your daily work: Making and kneading homemade pizza dough Supervising the preparation of ingredients by the pizza team (cleaning vegetables, preparing sauces and toppings) Supporting and training newly hired pizza team members Monitoring and executing customer orders for pizza Making pizzas by hand and baking them professionally in the oven Keeping the kitchen, oven and utensils clean in accordance with HACCP regulations Improving the customer experience through skilful acrobatic pizza tossing | Skills, Knowledge and Expertise: You have an EU/EFTA identity card Previous relevant experience in a similar role and in a fast-paced environment. Exceptional service standards with attention to detail. Passion for hospitality with a friendly demeanour and a smile. Good English skills with the ability to communicate confidently. Ability to work under pressure and willingness to work in a team. Willingness to work full-time and be flexible. | Benefits: Live and work in the heart of the Engadin Alps A wide range of creative opportunities A pleasant working atmosphere in a young and dynamic team International career prospects and development opportunities Outstanding employee benefits in all Kempinski hotels, among others Staff accommodation in the immediate vicinity of the hotel, including laundry facilities, a fitness and common room, a kitchen and a wide range of dishes in our staff restaurant Free use of the in-house daycare centre for employee children Monthly employee activities such as skiing, snowboarding and cross-country skiing courses, hiking trips, spa evenings and German courses Internal ‘Feel Good Committee’ to help shape all welfare issues

jobs.title: Chef de Partie (f/m/d)
jobs.company: Grand Hotel des Bains Kempinski St. Moritz
jobs.description:
Under a name steeped in tradition, Kempinski, hoteliers since 1897, has travelled the world in search of fascinating destinations without ever forgetting its traditions and European heritage. The lavish resorts as well as the stylish city and wellness hotels reflect an individual and unique character, especially for guests who appreciate 5-star service and luxury when travelling for business or pleasure. Do you aim to reach high standards? Are you only satisfied when your guests are? Are you highly motivated and do you appreciate the expertise of a well-coordinated team? To strengthen our creative culinary team, we are looking for you as a motivated and dynamic Chef de Partie for the upcoming summerseason 2026. | Key 
• Responsibilities: Organising the kitchen post Preparing food, drinks, materials and equipment for service Cooking and serving dishes Instructing cooks, kitchen assistants and stewards Cleaning and preparing the work area Conducting training courses Assisting with development meetings Ensuring correct on boarding into the company | Skills, Knowledge and Expertise: Completed training as a chef and several years of professional experience in upscale gastronomy in a comparable position First experience in Greek and Mediterranean cuisine Excellent product knowledge of Greek cuisine Professional competence, creativity and attention to detail, as well as very high quality awareness Structured and organised way of working Great interest in team-oriented work Very good knowledge of German and English | Benefits: Live and work in the heart of the Engadine Alps A wide range of creative opportunities Pleasant working atmosphere in a young and dynamic team International career prospects and development opportunities Outstanding employee benefits in all Kempinski Hotels Staff accommodation in the immediate vicinity of the hotel incl. washing facilities, fitness communal room and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant. Laundry facilities, fitness communal room, kitchen and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant Free use of the in-house daycare centre to look after employees' children Monthly employee activities such as ski, snowboard and cross-country skiing courses, hiking excursions, spa evenings and German courses Internal ‘Feel Good Committee’ to help shape all welfare issues

jobs.title: In-Room Dining Supervisor (f/m/d)
jobs.company: Grand Hotel des Bains Kempinski St. Moritz
jobs.description:
Under a name steeped in tradition, Kempinski, hoteliers since 1897, has travelled the world in search of fascinating destinations without ever forgetting its traditions and European heritage. The lavish resorts as well as the stylish city and wellness hotels reflect an individual and unique character, especially for guests who appreciate 5-star service and luxury when travelling for business or pleasure. What actually makes a Grand Hotel? It is ahead of its time, it creates traditions and cultivates them. Would you like to develop your own traditions and strengthen our positioning as a sporty, welcoming and refreshingly uncomplicated 5-star hotel? Then we are looking for you for the coming summerseason 2026 as a Supervisor in our In-Room Dining! | Key 
• Responsibilities: Your motto is to be a perfect and endearing host to every guest. Together with the entire service team, you will ensure the culinary experience of our guests in our Room Service Outlet. Your main tasks include: Coordinating with Waiter/ Waitress Minibar Attendant. Responsible for taking orders by phone and correct booking in POS communication to service and kitchen. Active explanation and sale of all food/drinks offered as well as offering alternatives. Monitoring of utilities, supplies and removal of waste. Ensuring that the workplace and its surroundings are always kept clean and organised. Organising and carrying out preparation and follow-up tasks. Dealing courteously and efficiently with guest enquiries and complaints and reporting to supervisor(s). Competent use of the POS system to the level of training required in the department. Support with stocktaking of products and work equipment. Supervision of service and taking over instructions for the team. | Skills, Knowledge and Expertise: Completed training in a comparable hotel and professional experience in upscale gastronomy Several years of experience in a similar position In addition to your impeccable appearance and well-groomed appearance, you impress with your natural charm, communication skills and knowledge of human nature Ability to work under pressure, flexibility and very high quality awareness Structured and organised way of working Great interest in team-oriented work Very good knowledge of German and English; any other language is an advantage | Benefits: Live and work in the heart of the Engadine Alps A wide range of creative opportunities Pleasant working atmosphere in a young and dynamic team International career prospects and development opportunities Outstanding employee benefits in all Kempinski Hotels Staff accommodation in the immediate vicinity of the hotel incl. washing facilities, fitness communal room and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant. Laundry facilities, fitness communal room, kitchen and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant Free use of the in-house daycare centre to look after employees' children Monthly employee activities such as ski, snowboard and cross-country skiing co

Supervision of service and taking over instructions for the team. | Skills, Knowledge and Expertise: Completed training in a comparable hotel and professional experience in upscale gastronomy Several years of experience in a similar position In addition to your impeccable appearance and well-groomed appearance, you impress with your natural charm, communication skills and knowledge of human nature Ability to work under pressure, flexibility and very high quality awareness Structured and organised way of working Great interest in team-oriented work Very good knowledge of German and English; any other language is an advantage | Benefits: Live and work in the heart of the Engadine Alps A wide range of creative opportunities Pleasant working atmosphere in a young and dynamic team International career prospects and development opportunities Outstanding employee benefits in all Kempinski Hotels Staff accommodation in the immediate vicinity of the hotel incl. washing facilities, fitness communal room and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant. Laundry facilities, fitness communal room, kitchen and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant Free use of the in-house daycare centre to look after employees' children Monthly employee activities such as ski, snowboard and cross-country skiing co

jobs.title: Steward (f/m/d)
jobs.company: Grand Hotel des Bains Kempinski St. Moritz
jobs.description:
Under a name steeped in tradition, Kempinski, hoteliers since 1897, has travelled the world in search of fascinating destinations without ever forgetting its traditions and European heritage. The lavish resorts as well as the stylish city and wellness hotels reflect an individual and unique character, especially for guests who appreciate 5-star service and luxury when travelling for business or pleasure. Working behind the scenes is important to you. You like to take on responsibility, maintain an overview even in stressful situations and ensure a clean and organised workplace. We are looking for you to join our stewarding team as a steward for the summerseason 2026! | Key 
• Responsibilities: Cleaning, care and storage of porcelain, glass, cutlery and kitchen crockery Cleanliness of the kitchen area and F B back office area Proper use and care of the machines and equipment provided Waste disposal in accordance with local guidelines Onboarding of new employees | Skills, Knowledge and Expertise: Completed vocational training as a hotel specialist or comparable experience in the stewarding team in the upscale hotel industry A high degree of flexibility, assertiveness, resilience and commitment Team-oriented, independent and precise way of working German or English language skills | Benefits: Live and work in the heart of the Engadine Alps A wide range of creative opportunities Pleasant working atmosphere in a young and dynamic team International career prospects and development opportunities Outstanding employee benefits in all Kempinski Hotels Staff accommodation in the immediate vicinity of the hotel incl. washing facilities, fitness communal room and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant. Laundry facilities, fitness communal room, kitchen and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant Free use of the in-house daycare centre to look after employees' children Monthly employee activities such as ski, snowboard and cross-country skiing courses, hiking excursions, spa evenings and German courses Internal ‘Feel Good Committee’ to help shape all welfare issues

jobs.title: Room Attendant (f/m/d)
jobs.company: Grand Hotel des Bains Kempinski St. Moritz
jobs.department: Rooms Division, Front Office & Guest Services
jobs.description:
Under a name steeped in tradition, Kempinski, hoteliers since 1897, has travelled the world in search of fascinating destinations without ever forgetting its traditions and European heritage. The lavish resorts as well as the stylish city and wellness hotels reflect an individual and unique character, especially for guests who appreciate 5-star service and luxury when travelling for business or pleasure. We are looking for you as a Room Attendant! | Key 
• Responsibilities: Cleaning the guest rooms Checking the functionality and good condition of the items in the room during cleaning Cleaning the corridors and floors Ensuring the maintenance and cleanliness of the equipment and the floor offices Carrying out the turn-down service | Skills, Knowledge and Expertise: Do you have an eye for detail and work in an organised and precise manner even in stressful situations? We are looking for you to join our dynamic and highly motivated housekeeping team! For this challenging task you have Ability to work under pressure, tidiness and very high quality awareness Structured and organised way of working Great interest in team-oriented work Good knowledge of German and English | 
• We offer: Live and work in the heart of the Engadine Alps A wide range of creative opportunities Pleasant working atmosphere in a young and dynamic team International career prospects and development opportunities Outstanding employee benefits in all Kempinski Hotels Staff accommodation in the immediate vicinity of the hotel incl. washing facilities, fitness communal room and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant. Laundry facilities, fitness communal room, kitchen and a wide range of meals in our staff restaurant Free use of the in-house childcare centre for employees' children Monthly employee activities such as skiing, snowboarding and cross-country skiing courses, hiking excursions, spa evenings and German courses Internal ‘Feel Good Committee’ to help shape all welfare issues

jobs.title: Assistant Restaurant Manager
jobs.description:
Die Hauptaufgabe dieser Position eine profitable und qualitativ hochwertige Restaurant, Banquet und In room dining operation zu managen, durch Speisen und Getränke zu servieren und einen zuvorkommenden, professionellen, effizienten und flexiblen Service im Rahmen der Standards des Hotels / Restaurants und Kempinskis DNA Werten zu erbringen. Sowie außerdem die Verkäufe und Gästezufriedenheit zu maximieren. Alle Regeln und Regulierungen innerhalb des Hotels strikt eingeführt und eingehalten werden. Dies beinhaltet auch die Sicherheits- und Brandschutzbestimmungen sowie Hygieneregeln inklusive HACCP Das Service Team ist gut organisiert und alle 
• Aufgaben entsprechend der Mitarbeiter verteilt . Die Umsätze das volle Potential der Abteilung ausschöpfen und das Budget eingehalten wird. Eine hohe Qualität an Produkten und ein hoher Servicestandard in der Abteilung vorherrscht Die Abteilung mit unternehmerischem Denken geführt wird und stetig Ausschau nach Möglichkeiten mehr Geschäft zu generieren gehalten wird | Hauptaufgaben:: Reporting Line zum F B Manager EAM in charge of F B Verantwortlich für Ass. Rest Manager, Supervisor, Chef de Rang, Demi-Chef de Rang, Commis de Rang, Azubis, Praktikanten, Hostess, Supervisor Ein Vorbild sein, indem man pünktlich, in passender Kleidung und gepflegt zur Arbeit erscheint (im Einklang mit dem Dresscode des Hotels und den Kempinski Grooming Standards). Stets auf ein gepflegtes Aussehen und Auftreten Wert legen. Stets höfliche und professionelle Serviceleistungen erbringen und sicherstellen, dass alle Mitarbeiter der Abteilung diesem Beispiel folgen. Alle 
• Aufgaben und Pflichten werden wie für die Abteilung notwendig ausgeführt. Über alle Dienstleistungen und Produkte des Hotels Bescheid wissen Ein umfassendes Wissen und Verständnis über alle Speisen und Getränke der Abteilung zu haben. Upselling erklären und verstehen und es für alle Produkte betreiben und Alternative anbieten. Überwachen des Equipments, und Reduzierung von Materialverlusten Sicherstellen, dass der Arbeitsplatz sauber und organisiert ist Regelmäßige Mitarbeitergespräche, Beurteilungen, Probezeitgespräche durchführen Sich bei Interviews aktiv zu involvieren Höflicher und emphatischer Umgang mit Gästen, Wünschen. Berichten von Gästebeschwerden und Feedback an EAM /F B Mgr/Assistant RST Manager, FUP sicherstellen Nutzung der vorhandenen Kommunikationsmittel, wie Samfex Bedienen des Micros Systems basierend auf der benötigten/erlernten Kenntnis der Abteilung. Bedienen des Samfex Systems. Beachtung aller Regeln, welche in den Hotels Regulierungen erstellt wurden, sowie strikte Einhaltung der Brandschutzregeln, Hygiene- und Sicherheitsstandards. Ein harmonisches Arbeitsverhältnis mit allen Mitarbeitern der Abteilung und des Hotels pflegen Aktive Teilnahme an allen Staff Meetings, Abteilung Trainings und anderen Hotel Trainings. Übernehmen von angemessenen 
• Aufgaben und weiteren Pflichten, wie vom Department Head angeordnet. Reagieren auf Änderungen innerhalb

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione - Il compito principale di questa posizione è gestire un'attività redditizia e di alta qualità di ristorante, banchetti e ristorazione in camera, servendo cibo e bevande e offrendo un servizio cortese, professionale, efficiente e flessibile secondo gli standard dell'hotel/ristorante e i valori del DNA di Kempinski - oltre a massimizzare le vendite e la soddisfazione degli ospiti - Tutte le regole e i regolamenti all'interno dell'hotel sono rigorosamente applicati e - Questo include anche regolamenti sulla sicurezza e antincendio, nonché le norme igieniche tra cui l'HACCP - Il team di assistenza è ben organizzato e tutte le attività sono distribuite secondo i dipendenti - Le vendite sfruttano appieno il potenziale del dipartimento e rispettano il budget - Prevalgono prodotti di alta qualità e un alto livello di servizio - Il dipartimento è gestito con una mentalità imprenditoriale ed è costantemente alla ricerca di opportunità Per generare più affari viene mantenuta ## Responsabilità principali - Linea di riferimento al F B Manager - EAM responsabile di F B - Responsabile dell'Ass. Responsabile del Riposo, Supervisore, Chef de Rang, Demi-Chef de Rang, Commissario di Rang, Tirocinanti, Stagisti, Hostess, Supervisore - Sii un modello arrivando puntuale al lavoro, con abiti appropriati e ben curati (in linea con il dress code dell'hotel e gli Standard di Cura Kempinski) - Attribuire sempre importanza a un aspetto e a un aspetto curati - Fornire e garantire sempre servizi educati e professionali, che tutti i dipendenti del dipartimento seguano questo esempio - Tutti i compiti e le mansioni sono svolti secondo necessità per il dipartimento - Conoscere tutti i servizi e i prodotti dell'hotel - Avere una conoscenza e una comprensione approfondite di tutti gli alimenti e le bevande del dipartimento - Spiegare e comprendere l'upselling e gestirlo per tutti i prodotti e offrire alternative - Monitorare le attrezzature, e riduzione delle perdite materiali - Assicurarsi che il luogo di lavoro sia pulito e organizzato - Condurre revisioni regolari dei dipendenti, valutazioni, discussioni durante il periodo di prova - Partecipare attivamente ai colloqui - Interazione educata ed enfatica con gli ospiti, richieste - Segnalare reclami degli ospiti e fornire feedback a EAM/F B Responsabile RST, FUP - Utilizzare strumenti di comunicazione esistenti, come Samfex - Gestire il sistema Micros basato su Conoscenza richiesta/appresa del dipartimento - Funzionamento del sistema Samfex - Conformità a tutte le regole stabilite nei regolamenti dell'hotel, nonché rigorosa rispetto delle norme di sicurezza antincendio, igiene e sicurezza - Mantenimento di un rapporto di lavoro armonioso con tutti i dipendenti del dipartimento e dell'hotel - Partecipazione attiva a tutte le riunioni del personale, corsi di formazione del dipartimento e altre formazioni alberghiere - Assunzione di compiti e altri compiti appropriati, come indicato dal Capo Dipartimento - Rispondere ai cambiamenti all'interno
descriptionByLocale.en:
Descrizione - The main task of this position is to manage a profitable and high quality restaurant, banquet and in-room dining operation, by serving food and beverages and to provide a courteous, professional, efficient and flexible service within the standards of the hotel/restaurant and Kempinski's DNA values - As well as to maximize sales and guest satisfaction - All rules and regulations within the hotel are strictly implemented and - This also includes safety and fire safety regulations as well as hygiene rules including HACCP - The service team is well organized and all tasks are distributed according to the employees - Sales exploit the full potential of the department and the budget is adhered to - A high quality of products and a high standard of service prevails in the department - The department is managed with an entrepreneurial mindset and is constantly on the lookout for opportunities To generate more business is kept ## Main 
• Responsibilities - Reporting Line to F B Manager - EAM in charge of F B - Responsible for Ass. Rest Manager, Supervisor, Chef de Rang, Demi-Chef de Rang, Commis de Rang, Trainees, Interns, Hostess, Supervisor - Be a role model by arriving at work on time, in appropriate clothes and well-groomed (in line with the hotel's dress code and Kempinski Grooming Standards) - Always attach importance to a well-groomed appearance and appearance - Always provide and ensure polite and professional services, that all employees of the department follow this example - All tasks and duties are carried out as necessary for the department - Know about all services and products of the hotel - Have a comprehensive knowledge and understanding of all food and beverages of the department - Explain and understand upselling and operate it for all products and offer alternatives - Monitor the equipment, and reduction of material losses - Ensure that the workplace is clean and organized - Conduct regular employee reviews, appraisals, probationary period discussions - Actively participate in interviews - Polite and emphatic interaction with guests, requests - Report guest complaints and provide feedback to EAM /F B Mgr/Assistant RST Manager, FUP - Use existing communication tools, such as Samfex - Operate the Micros system based on the Required/learned knowledge of the department - Operation of the Samfex system - Compliance with all rules created in the hotel regulations, as well as strict adherence to fire safety rules, hygiene and safety standards - Maintaining a harmonious working relationship with all employees of the department and the hotel - Active participation in all staff meetings, department trainings and other hotel trainings - Taking on appropriate tasks and other duties, as directed by the Department Head - Responding to changes within

• Aufgaben und weiteren Pflichten, wie vom Department Head angeordnet - Reagieren auf Änderungen innerhalb
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione - La principale tâche de ce poste est de gérer un restaurant, un banquet et une restauration rentable et de haute qualité, en servant nourriture et boissons, et en offrant un service courtois, professionnel, efficace et flexible, dans le respect des standards de l’hôtel/restaurant et des valeurs ADN de Kempinski - Ainsi que de maximiser les ventes et la satisfaction des clients - Toutes les règles et réglementations de l’hôtel sont strictement appliquées et - Cela inclut également les réglementations sur la sécurité et la sécurité incendie ainsi que les règles d’hygiène, y compris le HACCP - L’équipe de service est bien organisée et toutes les tâches sont réparties selon les employés - Les ventes exploitent tout le potentiel du département et le budget sont respectés - Une qualité de produits et un haut niveau de service prévalent dans le département - Le département est géré avec un esprit entrepreneurial et est constamment à la recherche d’opportunités Pour générer plus d’affaires, on maintient ## Responsabilités principales - Ligne de rapport à F B Manager - EAM responsable de F B - Responsable de l’ASS. Responsable du repos, superviseur, chef de rang, demi-chef de rang, commis de rang, stagiaires, stagiaires, hôtesses, superviseurs - Être un modèle en arrivant au travail à l’heure, en vêtements appropriés et soignés (conformément au code vestimentaire de l’hôtel et aux normes de toilettage Kempinski) - Toujours accorder de l’importance à une apparence soignée et à un soin soigné - Toujours fournir et garantir des services polis et professionnels, que tous les employés du département suivent cet exemple - Toutes les tâches et devoirs sont accomplis selon les besoins du département - Connaître tous les services et produits de l’hôtel - Avoir une connaissance et une compréhension approfondies de tous les aliments et boissons du département - Expliquer et comprendre la vente en plus et l’exploiter pour tous les produits et proposer des alternatives - Surveiller l’équipement, et réduction des pertes matérielles - S’assurer que le lieu de travail est propre et organisé - Effectuer des évaluations régulières des employés, des évaluations, des discussions sur la période d’essai - Participer activement aux entretiens - Interaction polie et emphatique avec les invités, demandes - Signaler les plaintes des invités et fournir des retours à EAM/F B Gestionnaire adjoint RST, FUP - Utiliser les outils de communication existants, tels que Samfex - Exploiter le système Micros basé sur le Connaissances requises/acquises du département - Fonctionnement du système Samfex - Respect de toutes les règles établies dans la réglementation hôtelière, ainsi qu’un respect strict des règles de sécurité incendie, d’hygiène et de sécurité - Maintien d’une relation de travail harmonieuse avec tous les employés du département et de l’hôtel - Participation active à toutes les réunions du personnel, formations de département et autres formations hôtelières - Prise en charge des tâches et autres tâches appropriées, selon les directives du chef de département - Répondre aux changements internes
